text: The sterile smoothness of the corridor, the glass wall, and the industrial fixtures evoke a sense of modernity and detachment within me. Upon entering the vibrant R+D space, I am met with an explosion of color and words meant to provoke thought. I am drawn to the statement about uncertainty and reflection—the invitation to contemplate obscurity feels almost personal in its resonance. Surrounded by design and inquiry, I feel both curiosity and quiet anticipation, as if I am on the threshold of new understanding, urged to reflect on the connections between humans and technology.
